{{ create_form.price(placeholder="Input here") }}
{{ create_form.categories.label }} Tip: Hold ctrl / command to select multiple {{ create_form.categories(class="vendor-categories") }}
Note: Empty specifications will be ignored

{{ create_form.colors(placeholder="Input color like #FFB0FF") }}
Note: Empty images will be ignored
